description.home: A professional space for creators. Build your portfolio, join communities, and receive honest feedback. We care about content quality: strict 18+ moderation and protection against AI-generated art.
description.auth: Log in to publish your works, create albums, and connect with like-minded creators.
description.register: Sign up to create your own portfolio, organize your works into albums, and find like-minded creators. Chat with others and build your creative communities.
description.profile: User profile: user data, album navigation, and list of posts. Information panel with all author's publications.
description.gallery: Browse the works of VibeArt community members. Discover new creators, get inspired by creative works, and find those whose art resonates with you.
description.post: View the artwork, read the author's description, and join the discussion. Discover creative works by authors from the VibeArt community.
description.album: Browse the author's album: a curated collection of works with descriptions and publication dates. Explore the creative portfolio of VibeArt community members.
description.error: Access error. The requested page does not exist, has been removed, or is temporarily unavailable. Please check the URL or return to the homepage.
description.agreement: Review the terms of use, user rights and responsibilities, and the rules for providing services.
description.policy: Learn what personal data is collected on the site, how it is used, and how it is protected.
description.chats: Your personal conversations. Chat with other users, share impressions, and discuss creative works.
description.chat: Private conversation with a user. Chat in real time, share your works, and discuss creativity together.
description.communities: Find communities by interest, join creative groups, and start your own. Share your works, discuss ideas, and grow together with creators who share your spirit.
description.community: Creative community page: member posts, description, and group members. Join, share your works, and connect with creators who share your spirit.
description.postCreate: Create and publish your artwork on VibeArt. Upload an image, add a title, description, and tags to share your creative work with the community.
description.albumCreate: Create and organize your artwork collection on VibeArt. Upload a cover image, add a title and description to share your creative album with the community.
description.settings: Manage your VibeArt profile: edit your name, avatar, and bio. Customize your page so the community sees you as you truly are.
description.communityCreate: Create your own creative community on VibeArt. Add a photo, name, description, and unique identifier to bring like-minded people together around a shared idea.
description.contacts: Use this form to send requests, report bugs, or submit suggestions. You can also write to us directly via email.

home.introTitle: Create together with those who understand
home.introDescription: Your space for self-expression without the noise. Organize your best work into albums, share moments of inspiration, and find support among those who value hand-crafted work and sincere ideas.
home.step1Description: Organize your work into beautiful themed albums. Let them be sketches, finished masterpieces, or just your mood today.
home.step2Description: Engage in meaningful dialogues. Share your progress and get feedback from a community that speaks your language.
home.step3Description: We strive to protect the feed from the endless flow of AI-generated content. This is a place for authors who put their thoughts and feelings into their work, rather than just pressing a button.
home.CTATitle: Your creativity deserves the right place
home.CTADescription: Join a community that values not only the final result but also the author's journey.

settings.title: Settings
settings.avatarDescription: Recommended size 400x400px in JPG or PNG format. It will be displayed as a circle across all your activities.
settings.nameDescription: Your real name or creative alias
settings.descriptionMobile: Write a few words about yourself
settings.descriptionDesktop: Here you can write a few words about who you are and what you love. Share how you got to where you are, and what you enjoy most about the process. Maximum 200 characters.

createAlbum.title: Create album
createAlbum.imgDescription: The main cover image of the album.
createAlbum.nameDescription: A short text title for the album
createAlbum.textDescriptionMobile: Write a few words about the album
createAlbum.textDescriptionDesktop: Describe the concept of the collection in more detail. If the works inside share a common theme or story — be sure to mention it.

createCommunity.title: Create community
createCommunity.avatarDescription: Recommended size 400x400px in JPG or PNG format. It will be displayed as a circle across all community activities.
createCommunity.nameDescription: The official name of the community
createCommunity.textDescriptionMobile: Write a few words about the community
createCommunity.textDescriptionDesktop: An informational block describing the goals, rules, and topics of the community. Helps users get a complete picture of the community's activities.

createPost.title: Create post
createPost.imgDescription: The main media file of the post.
createPost.nameDescription: A short text identifier for the work
createPost.textDescriptionMobile: Write a few words about the post
createPost.textDescriptionDesktop: Extended text information for the publication. Used to provide context, creation details, and additional data about the content.

contacts.description: Use this form to send requests, report bugs, or submit suggestions. You can also write to us at {{email}}

policy.title: PRIVACY POLICY
policy.subtitle: regarding the processing of personal data
policy.title2: BASIC TERMS USED IN THE POLICY
policy.title4: LEGAL BASIS AND LIST OF PROCESSED PERSONAL DATA
policy.text1_1: This Personal Data Processing Policy (hereinafter referred to as the Policy) is drafted in accordance with the requirements of Federal Law No. 152-FZ “On Personal Data” and defines the procedure for processing personal data and measures to ensure the security of personal data taken by an individual Bitsulov Roman Alexandrovich, address: Russian Federation, Nizhny Novgorod Region, Vadsky Municipal District, village of Vad (hereinafter referred to as the Operator).
policy.text1_2: The Operator considers the observance of human and civil rights and freedoms in the processing of personal data, including the protection of the right to privacy and personal and family secrets, to be its most important goal and condition for carrying out its activities.
policy.text1_3: This Policy applies to all information that the Operator may obtain about visitors of the website https://vibe-art.ru/ (hereinafter referred to as the Website).
policy.text1_4: Users of the Website may be persons who have reached the age of 14. Persons under 18 use the Website with the consent of their legal representatives.
policy.text2_1: Automated processing of personal data – processing of personal data using computer technology.
policy.text2_2: Blocking of personal data – temporary suspension of personal data processing (except when processing is necessary to clarify personal data).
policy.text2_3: Website – a set of graphic and informational materials, as well as computer programs and databases ensuring their availability on the Internet at the network address https://vibe-art.ru/.
policy.text2_4: Personal data information system – a set of personal data contained in databases and the information technologies and technical means ensuring their processing.
policy.text2_5: Depersonalization of personal data – actions as a result of which it is impossible to determine, without additional information, the belonging of personal data to a specific User or other personal data subject.
policy.text2_6: Processing of personal data – any action (operation) or set of actions (operations) performed with or without automation tools on personal data, including collection, recording, systematization, accumulation, storage, clarification (updating, modification), extraction, use, transfer (distribution, provision, access), depersonalization, blocking, deletion, and destruction of personal data.
policy.text2_7: Operator – a state authority, municipal authority, legal entity, or individual that independently or jointly with others organizes and/or carries out the processing of personal data and determines the purposes of personal data processing, the composition of personal data to be processed, and the actions (operations) performed on personal data.
policy.text2_8: Personal data – any information relating directly or indirectly to an identified or identifiable User of the website https://vibe-art.ru/.
policy.text2_9: User – any visitor of the website https://vibe-art.ru/ who has reached the age of 14.
policy.text2_10: Provision of personal data – actions aimed at disclosing personal data to a specific person or a specific group of persons.
policy.text2_11: Dissemination of personal data – any actions aimed at disclosing personal data to an indefinite number of persons or making personal data accessible to an unlimited number of persons.
policy.text2_12: Cross-border transfer of personal data – transfer of personal data to the territory of a foreign state to a foreign authority, foreign individual, or foreign legal entity.
policy.text2_13: Destruction of personal data – any actions resulting in the irreversible destruction of personal data.
policy.text3_1: Purposes of processing the User's personal data:
policy.text3_1_1: registration and authentication of Users on the Website;
policy.text3_1_2: establishing feedback with the User, including sending notifications, requests related to the use of the Website, and processing User inquiries and requests;
policy.text3_1_3: collecting information about User actions on the Website, improving the quality of the Website and its content (anonymized data).
policy.text3_2: The Operator has the right to send the User notifications about new products and services, special offers, and various events. The User may opt out of receiving informational messages at any time by sending an email to vibeartfake@mail.ru with the subject “Unsubscribe from notifications”.
policy.text3_3: Anonymized User data collected using internet statistics services is used to collect information about User actions on the Website and to improve the quality of the Website and its content.
policy.text4_1: The Operator processes the User's personal data only if it is filled in and/or submitted by the User independently through special forms located on the website https://vibe-art.ru/. By filling out the relevant forms and/or submitting personal data, the User agrees to this Policy.
policy.text4_2: The Operator processes the following personal data of the User:
policy.text4_2_3: profile image (avatar) uploaded by the User;
policy.text4_2_4: anonymized data about visitors (including cookies) using internet statistics services.
policy.text4_3: Personal data processing is carried out based on the following principles:
policy.text4_3_2: limitation of personal data processing to achieving specific, predetermined, and legitimate purposes;
policy.text4_3_3: prevention of personal data processing incompatible with the purposes of data collection.
policy.text4_4: The Operator processes personal data only if at least one of the following conditions is met:
policy.text4_4_1: the data subject has given consent to the processing of their personal data;
policy.text4_4_2: processing is necessary to achieve purposes established by law;
policy.text4_4_3: processing is necessary for the performance of a contract to which the data subject is a party or beneficiary.
policy.text4_5: Personal data is processed and stored until the purposes of processing are achieved or until the User's account is deleted.
policy.text4_6: The User has the right to receive information about the processing of their personal data and to request clarification, blocking, or deletion.
policy.text5_1: The User may obtain any clarifications regarding the processing of their personal data by contacting the Operator via email vibeartfake@mail.ru.
policy.text5_2: Any changes to the personal data processing policy will be reflected in this document. The Policy is valid indefinitely until replaced by a new version.
policy.text5_3: The current version of the Policy is publicly available on the Internet at https://vibe-art.ru/policy.

agreement.title: USER AGREEMENT (PUBLIC OFFER)
agreement.subtitle: This User Agreement (hereinafter referred to as the “Agreement”) is a public offer and defines the terms of use of materials and services available on the website located at: https://vibe-art.ru (hereinafter referred to as the “Website”) by visitors and users of this Website (hereinafter referred to as the “Users”).
agreement.title3: RIGHTS AND OBLIGATIONS OF THE PARTIES
agreement.text1_1: Website Administration – an individual Bitsulov Roman Alexandrovich, address: Russian Federation, Nizhny Novgorod Region, Vadsky Municipal District, village of Vad, who is the owner of the Website.
agreement.text1_2: User – an individual who has reached the age of 14 and uses the Website. Persons under 18 use the Website with the consent of their legal representatives.
agreement.text1_3: Website – a set of software for computers and other information contained in an information system, access to which is provided via the Internet under the domain name https://vibe-art.ru.
agreement.text1_4: Acceptance of the offer – full and unconditional acceptance by the User of the terms of this Agreement by using the Website (viewing pages, registration, submitting forms, etc.).
agreement.text2_1: The Website Administration grants the User the right to use the Website and its services on an “as is” basis. The Administration does not guarantee that the Website will meet the User’s expectations.
agreement.text2_2: This Agreement is a legally binding document for both the User and the Website Administration.
agreement.text3_1: The Website Administration undertakes to provide access to the Website and ensure the confidentiality of User data in accordance with the Privacy Policy.
agreement.text3_2: The Website Administration has the right to:
agreement.text3_2_1: At any time change the content of the Website and the text of this Agreement, restrict access to the Website or its individual services, as well as completely terminate the operation of the Website. The new version of the Agreement comes into force from the moment it is published on the Website unless otherwise provided. Continued use of the Website after changes means acceptance of the new version. If the User disagrees, they must stop using the Website.
agreement.text3_2_2: Restrict access to the Website or its services in case of violation of this Agreement by the User.
agreement.text3_3_1: Comply with the terms of this Agreement.
agreement.text3_3_2: Not use the Website for actions that violate applicable laws of the Russian Federation.
agreement.text3_4_1: Copying, distributing, or modifying any information posted on the Website without prior consent of the Administration.
agreement.text3_5: The User agrees not to post information or objects (including, but not limited to, text and graphic materials) that may violate the rights and interests of others, as well as information prohibited by law.
agreement.text3_6: The Website Administration has the right to remove any information and/or materials posted by the User without notice if they violate the law, third-party rights, or this Agreement.
agreement.text4_1: All objects posted on the Website, including design elements, text, graphics, illustrations, videos, scripts, programs, and other objects (hereinafter referred to as the Content), are subject to exclusive rights of the Website Administration and other rights holders.
agreement.text4_2: The User retains exclusive rights to the Content they post on the Website.
agreement.text4_3: By posting Content on the Website, the User grants the Administration a non-exclusive right to use such Content for the operation of the Website, including storage, reproduction, and display.
agreement.text4_4: Any use of the Website or Content beyond what is permitted by this Agreement without prior written consent of the rights holder is strictly prohibited.
agreement.text5_1: Respect for third-party rights: The User guarantees that the Content they post does not violate intellectual property or other rights of third parties. The burden of proof lies with the User. The Administration is not responsible for copyright violations by Users.
agreement.text5_2: Content moderation: Posting 18+ materials and any content that violates applicable law is prohibited. The Administration moderates Content at its own discretion.
agreement.text5_3: Use of AI technologies: The Administration may use automated tools, including artificial intelligence, to detect violations. Decisions may be made automatically or after review.
agreement.text5_4: Communication rules: Interaction tools (likes, comments, private messages) must be used in good faith. Spam, harassment, insults, and unauthorized advertising are prohibited.
agreement.text5_5: Community responsibility: Community creators and moderators are responsible for moderation within their communities. The Administration may change management or remove a community in case of violations.
agreement.text5_6: Sanctions system: In case of violations, the following measures may apply:
agreement.text5_6_2: Assignment of public labels (statuses) indicating violations;
agreement.text5_6_3: Permanent blocking or deletion of the account without recovery.
agreement.text5_7: Data exchange security: It is prohibited to distribute malware, phishing links, or personal data of third parties without consent.
agreement.text5_8: Technological integrity: It is prohibited to bypass moderation systems, manipulate metrics, or use bots/scripts for mass data collection or automated uploads.
agreement.text6_1: The Website Administration is not liable for any damages incurred by the User in connection with the use of the Website.
agreement.text6_2: This Agreement is governed by the laws of the Russian Federation.
agreement.text6_3: All disputes shall be resolved through negotiations.
agreement.text6_4: Dispute resolution procedure: pre-trial claims process. Response time is 30 calendar days. Disputes are considered at the location of the Administration.
agreement.text7_1: This Agreement comes into force from the moment the User starts using the Website and remains valid indefinitely.
agreement.text7_2: The current version of the Agreement is always available at: https://vibe-art.ru/agreement.
agreement.text7_3: All matters not covered by this Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the Russian Federation.
agreement.text8_1: Individual Bitsulov Roman Alexandrovich, address: Russian Federation, Nizhny Novgorod Region, Vadsky Municipal District, village of Vad
